author: Besting
text: REVISED 2026-06-06: (1) add `bl prime --install` = recursive prime->install->prime->install down the config chain until self-contained (has tasks_branch, no redirect); stop-on-revisit (track seen), idempotent resume. (2) Standard case works via SEEDED defaults (origin + balls/tasks), NOT auto-authoritative discovery: plain prime syncs what landing names; non-default needs install. (3) prime seeds the landing from default-config/ on first contact. spec bl-2e26 §12/§13.
